definition: Deterministic retrospective System A score, used as the main temporal WBGT_A severity signal.
source_or_generation: Existing System A Level 1 OOF score, represented by model_score / prediction_wbgt_c in prior diagnostics.
allowed_use: Background retrospective temporal severity diagnostic and anchor for companion P_ge31 interpretation.
forbidden_use: Not local 100m WBGT, not official warning, not public alert, and not prospective forecast skill.
validation_basis: A-L1H.0 residual decomposition and A-L1H.2 score-threshold baselines.
caveat: High-tail compression remains visible near and above 31 C.

definition: Station-held-out score-to-event diagnostic probability for observed WBGT >= 31 C.
source_or_generation: M4_inertia_ridge score calibrated by isotonic_score_only; validation station_grouped_loso.
allowed_use: Internal retrospective ge31 high-tail review and companion flagging with threshold about 0.309.
forbidden_use: Not official warning probability, not policy probability, not public alert probability, and not prospective skill.
validation_basis: A-L1H.2 PASS_CANDIDATE_PROBABILITY_COMPANION; Brier 0.052, PR-AUC 0.610, F1 0.719, CSI 0.561.
caveat: Reliability is station-held-out OOF only; station/regime caveats remain.

definition: Selected candidate threshold for P_ge31 around 0.309 from best_F1 station-held-out diagnostics.
allowed_use: Optional internal retrospective diagnostic flag, with precision about 0.678 and recall about 0.765.
forbidden_use: Not final policy threshold, not operational warning trigger, and not a public-facing alert threshold.
caveat: Policy threshold is not final and requires prospective metadata / lead-time evaluation before operations.
